case_title: SCHWARTZ ESQ. ALLAN VS. ISAAC MAKARAN et al

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RETURNED -SMALL CLAIMS -CONTINUE ORDER - SENT TO PLAINTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-08-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED MAR-21-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAKARAN, ISAAC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED MAR-21-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MAKARAN, RENA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2012 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 5/11/12 TO DEFENDANT ISAAC MAKARAN, "NO SUCH ADDRESS/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY ALLAN, SCHWARTZ ESQ. AS TO DEFENDANT MAKARAN, ISAAC MAKARAN, RENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RENA MAKARAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLAN, SCHWARTZ ESQ. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MAKARAN, ISAAC MAKARAN, RENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
